chapters.title: Das Dorf am Rhein
chapters.setting: The village of Nebelhain at dusk. Smoke rises from thatched roofs. Villagers watch the stranger arrive with wary eyes.
chapters.plot_beat: Player arrives in Nebelhain. Must speak to 3 villagers to earn their trust.

challenges.prompt_en: An old woman blocks your path. She asks: 'Who are you, stranger?' — answer her in German.
challenges.example_answer: Ich bin [name]. Ich komme aus dem Norden.
challenges.grammar_focus: verb sein (to be), first person present

challenges.prompt_en: A child runs up to you and asks: 'Can you help us?' — answer in German.
challenges.example_answer: Ja, ich kann helfen. Was ist passiert?

chapters.title: Der erste Schatten
chapters.setting: The edge of the Nebelwald at night. The shadow moves between the trees. A dying oak bears carved runes.
chapters.plot_beat: Player tracks the shadow, finds runes connected to their family. First combat encounter.

chapters.title: Die Waldseherin
chapters.setting: A hidden clearing deep in the forest. Brunhilde sits before a fire that burns without wood.
chapters.plot_beat: Player meets Brunhilde. She speaks in riddles and reveals the nature of the curse.
chapters.language_focus: Modal verbs (müssen, können, dürfen), forming questions
